query: SELECT wi.id as instrument_id, wi.name, wi.deviceCode, wi.modelType, wi.slaveId, gcp.portNumber, gcp.ipAddress, gcp.networkPort, ic.id as channel_id, ic.channelNo, ic.label, ic.enabled, ic.scale, ic.offset, ic.unit, ic.precision as prec FROM weighingInstruments wi LEFT JOIN gatewayComPorts gcp ON wi.comPortId = gcp.id LEFT JOIN instrumentChannels ic ON ic.instrumentId = wi.id WHERE gcp.portNumber = 'COM1' ORDER BY ic.channelNo;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT wi.id as instrument_id, wi.name, wi.deviceCode, wi.modelType, wi.slaveId, gcp.portNumber, gcp.ipAddress, gcp.networkPort, ic.id as channel_id, ic.channelNo, ic.label, ic.enabled, ic.scale, ic.offset, ic.unit, ic.precision as prec FROM weighingInstruments wi LEFT JOIN gatewayComPorts gcp ON wi.comPortId = gcp.id LEFT JOIN instrumentChannels ic ON ic.instrumentId = wi.id WHERE gcp.portNumber = 'COM1' ORDER BY ic.channelNo;
